dir.name: cookie

title.v: phiếu xuất trả lại nhà cung cấp

dir.response:
&CommandSetVoucherNumber;
if exists(select 1 from dmkh where ma_kh = @ma_kh and cc_yn = 1) begin &EICustomerResponseExists; select rtrim(a.tk) as tk, b.ten_tk%l, rtrim(doi_tac) as ong_ba&EICustomerResponseValue; from dmkh a left join dmtk b on a.tk = b.tk where a.ma_kh = @ma_kh return end
if exists(select 1 from dmnx where ma_nx = @ma_nx) begin select rtrim(a.tk) as tk, b.ten_tk%l from dmnx a left join dmtk b on a.tk = b.tk where a.ma_nx = @ma_nx return end
if exists(select 1 from dmthue where ma_thue = @ma_thue) begin select a.thue_suat, rtrim(a.tk_thue_co3) as tk_thue, b.ten_tk%l, isnull(b.tk_cn, 0) as tk_cn from dmthue a left join dmtk b on a.tk_thue_co3 = b.tk where a.ma_thue = @ma_thue return end
if exists(select 1 from dmtk where tk = @tk_thue and loai_tk = 1) begin select tk_cn from dmtk where tk = @tk_thue return end
select rtrim(loai_ct) as loai_ct from dmmagd where ma_ct = 'PXC' and ma_gd = @ma_gd return
&XMLGetVoucherNumber; &XMLGetExchangeRate; &ListTicket;
